rows.label: tlk70000057_05_msg0001
rows.name:
Nii-chan says he wants to
be a Driver when he grows up.

rows.label: tlk70000057_05_msg0002
rows.name:
I was worried, wondering
what I should become, and
Noel listened to me.

rows.label: tlk70000057_05_msg0003
rows.name:
He said I should help
watch over bad people so
they don't get more bad.

rows.label: tlk70000057_05_msg0004
rows.name:
So I think I'll keep an eye on
Ivan's snacking for a while,
just like Noel said!
